task1.title: Task 1: Line Graph
task1.prompt: The graph below shows the consumption of fish and some different kinds of meat in a European country between 1979 and 2004. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.title: Task 2: Education Essay
task2.prompt: Some people believe that university education should be free for everyone, while others argue that students should pay for their own education. Discuss both views and give your own opinion. Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

task1.title: Task 1: Pie Charts
task1.prompt: The charts below show the results of a survey about what people think is the most important factor for a successful life in 1980 and 2010. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.title: Task 2: Environment Essay
task2.prompt: Some people think that the best way to solve environmental problems is to increase the price of fuel. To what extent do you agree or disagree? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

task1.title: Task 1: Process Diagram
task1.prompt: The diagram below shows the various stages in the production of olive oil. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.title: Task 2: Technology Essay
task2.prompt: With the rise of artificial intelligence, some people fear that many jobs will be replaced by robots. What are the potential impacts of this on society, and what measures can be taken to mitigate these effects?
